title: buxus macrophylla
intro: Buxus macrophylla, also known as boxwood, is a type of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Buxaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Buxus macrophylla include reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Buxus macrophylla is often combined with other plants to make teas, tinctures, and poultices, although it's worth noting that its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
